name: Rack (IDBM storage)
categoryNote: PROPOSED composite category 'racking' = schema section 2 racking_upright + racking_beam, assembled. Main session merges (or decompose into the granular categories).
status: DRAFT - placeholder dimensions; confirm with Mike.

params.desc: IDBM lanes per bay; total lanes = bays x lanesPerBay.

geometry.note: Canonical parametric form (mm). Mirrors the IDBM geometry-block pattern (schema section 2).
geometry.frame: Datum = pose {position,yaw} at near-bottom-centre. local X = bays/aisle run; local Y = lane depth; Z up.
geometry.uprights: (bays+1) upright frames at local x = -width/2 + i*bayWidth; each = 2 posts (front -Y, back +Y) of upright.section, floor to rack.height.
geometry.beams: front & back beams along X at each level z = base.height + k*levelPitch (k=0..levels-1).
geometry.lanes: each level carries lanes.total IDBMs at 300 mm pitch along X, each idbmLength deep along Y, resting on the beams. Reuses the shared IDBM drawer.
geometry.colours: Uprights + beams = muted blue-grey (0x415a77); IDBMs unchanged.
geometry.rule: IDBM module is FIXED (width 300, height 200). Bays, lanes, levels, pitch and depth all scale from the params.

connectionPoints.desc: -Y rack face: lane ends a Crane/Shuttle/AGV transfers to (per level).

meta.author: component-authoring session (parallel)
meta.form: selective rack: uprights + beams + IDBM lanes
meta.remainingAssumptions: section sizes, base.height, whether lanes are full-depth or paired, colour. Appearance to be revisited.
